option.value:
Live system monitoring

DXIR STATS

Connecting

Server health, player count, and resource usage in real time.

CPU Processor usage
--
Current load across all cores
RAM Memory usage
--
Used vs total system memory
PLAYERS Minecraft players
--
Online on localhost:25565
STATUS Server status
--
Online / offline health indicator
TIME Last updated
--
Waiting for the first update...
